summary: Strategic reassessment identified 6 viable strategies. Recommended Strategy E: abandon automorphism group approach, set D=Q (rationals) directly, build Q-indexed canonical histories using DN axiom + Lindenbaum, define TaskFrame Q from histories. This bypasses all current blockers (countability FALSE, density 4 sorries, Holder/freeness/homogeneity deferred). Q has full Mathlib infrastructure. Estimated 15-25 hours. Archive DenseQuotient.lean and TranslationGroup.lean.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive strategic reassessment: analyzes root causes of 3 blockers, evaluates 6 strategies (A-F), recommends Strategy E (D=Q fragment-based construction), details Mathlib infrastructure available, outlines Q-indexed canonical history construction, provides concrete next steps
